h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to analyze the sentences to distinguish between dialect rules and school rules.

scored.statedInsightEvidence: I thought the circled p-value was enough to carry the recommendation, because that is usually the flag I look for first. But it is only pushing back on chance, not showing whether the endpoint moved by enough to justify a workflow change.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to systematically apply the distinction between statistical significance and operational thresholds to revise the recommendation.

scored.statedInsightEvidence: I think I see the test a little better
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner steadily moves from expressing doubt about slow geological processes to cautiously applying the tutor's criteria for identifying repetitive patterns.

scored.statedInsightEvidence: that is about who has the burden, not about what truly happened
scored.naiveTrajectory: The dialogue proceeds in a straightforward manner with the learner repeating their initial confusion and slowly refining the handout's text.
The dialogue progresses linearly toward drafting a caption based on the exhibit's evidence.
The learner will continue to reconcile the visual appearance of the clear water with the balance's reading of extra mass.
